title: SAITUAL POLICE TEN MORPHINE TAM THAM TAK AN MAN
content:
782/2026-2027

Saitual, the 1st June, 2025:May ni 31, 2026 (Pathianni) khan Saitual DEF Special team te chuan Morphine kg 6.683 leh Heroin sahbawn case 1 an man.

May ni 31, Pathianni khan Saitual DEF Special team te chuan motor Ashok Leyland (golden brown) registration No. AS 01 JC-9512, Raju Giri (32) s/o Dambar BarGiri khalh, Manipur kalkawng atanga Aizawl pan chu rinhlehna avangin Keifang khaw daiah an tiding a, uluk taka motor hi endik a nih hnuah driver thutna sira kaw siam chawpah morphine nia rinhlelh packet 13, kg 6.683, ₹6,68,30,000 man hu hmuh chhuah a ni a, hei bakah hian Heroin gram 12, ₹2,40,000 man hu hmuh chuan a ni bawk.

Heng an thil mante hi thuhretute awm laiin a hnuaia tarlan te kut atanga man a ni:

1. Raju Giri (32) S/o Dambar Bar Giri of Bokajan CF, Karbi Anglong, Assam.

2. Karnamani Das (26) s/o Kanu Das of Misamari, Nutun Bazar, Nagaon, Assam

3. Ganesh Das (40) S/o Subodh Das of Lal Ganesh, Banik Para, Kamrup Metro, Assam.

Saitual Police te chuan dan angin hma an la nghal a, mobile phone 3 te chu an mante hnen atanga laksakin, case an ziak lut nghal bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: AFRICAN SWINE FEVER (ASF) HRILENG CHUNGCHANGA DEPUTY COMMISSIONER MAMIT THUPEK CHHUAH
content:
781/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 1st of June, 2026:Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah Vawk pul hri African Swine Fever (ASF) leng te a zia awm ta deuh a hriat a ni a. Amaherawhchu, he hri hi engtik lai pawha pung hluai thei reng anih avangin, ASF laka Mamit District kan lo him theihna turin thupek chhuah tula hriat a ni.

Chuvangin, Pu SUVIGYA S CHANDRA, IAS, District Magistrate, Mamit District chuan Section 163, Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023 in thuneihna a pek angin a hnuaia mi ang hian khapna thupek a chhuah.

1) Mamit District chhungah ramdang (foreign countries) leh State dang atangin vawk, vawksa rep leh vawksa atanga siam lakluh khap tlat a ni.

2) ASF infected area/District danga ASF lenna atangin vawk, vawksa leh a rep atanga siam ei tur Mamit District chhunga lakluh khap tlat a ni.

3) Vawk neitu ten vawk damlo an hralh/talh tur a ni lo.

4) Vawk damlo nei chuan a rang thei ang berin District Veterinary Hospital-ah emaw mahni khua theuha VFA/VC te hnenah emaw an report thin tur a ni.

\5) Vawk thi reng reng Chinai thi/Bleaching Powder nen thuk taka phum tur a ni a, khamah leh ramhnuaiah paih mai mai tur a ni lo.

6) Vawk thi a awmin a neitute'n A.H & Vety Department, Mamit hriattir vat tur a ni.

He thupek bawhchhetute chu Section 223, Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS), 2023 hmangin hrem theih an ni ang. He khapna thupek hian, tihdanglam emaw hnuhlet emaw a nih loh chuan, chhuah a nih atanga thla 2 (hnih) chhung a huam ang.

Issued by, District Information & Public Relations Office: Mamit District, MamitASF..pdfWhatsApp Image 2026-06-01 at 3.31.44 PM.jpeg

title: CHIEF MINISTER ATTENDS MEETING-CUM-WORKSHOP FOR DEPARTMENTS USING SNA SPARSH
content:
129/2026-2027

Aizawl, 1 June 2026:A Meeting-cum-Workshop on SASCI and SNA SPARSH was held today at the Planning & Programme Implementation Conference Hall for Administrative Heads of Departments using SNA SPARSH. The programme was attended by Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, who also holds the Finance portfolio.

Speaking on the occasion, the Chief Minister stated that with the rapid advancement of technology, the mechanisms for receiving and utilizing Central funds have also become increasingly sophisticated. These developments are intended to make financial management more efficient and convenient.

As SNA SPARSH serves as the principal platform through which the State receives and manages a significant portion of its funds, it is essential that all concerned departments have a clear understanding of its functioning. He noted that the meeting-cum-workshop was organized to ensure that the system is implemented more effectively this year than in previous years.

The Chief Minister highlighted that Mizoram received an incentive of Rs. 350 crore under SASCI Part 9 for Efficiency in Financial Management owing to its good performance and coordinated efforts during the previous year. He expressed the State Government's determination to secure all reform-linked incentives available under various components of SASCI during the current year as well.

To facilitate this objective, the Government of Mizoram has delegated financial powers to all Administrative Heads under the Charter of Financial Advisers. This, he said, would streamline and expedite the issuance of Administrative Approvals and Expenditure Sanctions.

He further emphasized an important lesson learned from previous years: once a mother sanction is received, funds must be utilized promptly and SNA SPARSH accounts must be closed in a timely manner. This also requires Administrative Heads to ensure that Utilization Certificates are prepared and submitted without delay. He urged all departments to remain prepared and proactive in this regard.

The Chief Minister also informed the participants that under the revised implementation framework of SASCI Part 9, all schemes will need to be executed through the Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) mode. This requirement will extend to State Welfare Schemes as well, making it necessary for all departments to adopt the DBT system.

He also noted that under the ongoing SASCI programme for 2026–27, Mizoram stands to receive incentives amounting to Rs. 650 crore under Parts 4 and 9. Since these incentives would significantly benefit the State, he called upon all departments to work collectively and diligently to ensure that the State secures the full amount available. He urged participants to make the workshop productive and beneficial.

The workshop was jointly organized by the Institute of Government Accounts & Finance and the Finance Department, Government of Mizoram. The programme was chaired by Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Commissioner, Finance. Following the inaugural session, experts delivered technical presentations and training sessions on the subject.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER HOVIN SNA SPARSH HMANG DEPARTMENT TE TAN MEETING CUM WORKSHOP BUATSAIH A NI
content:
780/2026-2027

Aizawl the 1st June 2026:Vawiin khan Planning & Programme Implementation Conference Hall-ah SNA SPARSH hmangtu Department Administrative Head-te pualin SASCI & SNA SPARSH chungchang Meeting cum Workshop buatsaih a ni a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, Finance Minister ni bawk chuan a telpui.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, technology thar lo chhuak zelah central fund kan dawn dan leh a hman dan kalphung pawh a lo changkang ve zel a. Hei hi awlsamna min thlentu tur an ni.

SNA SPARSH pawh hi kan sum hnar lian ber kan kalpuina anih angin a hmangtu Department ten chiang taka kan hriat a tul a. Kum liam ta aia kuminah tha zawka kan kalpui theih nan meeting cum workshop pawh hi kan buatsaih a ni.

Nikum khan kan thawhhona a that avangin SASCI Part 9 ah Efficiency in Financial Management incentives Rs. 350 Crore kan dawng a. Kuminah hian SASCI Part tina reform-link incentive awm zawng zawngte dawng thei khawpa tan lak kan duh.

Chutianga kan kal theih nan chuan Mizoram sorkar chuan Administrative Head zawng zawngte chu Charter of Financial Advisers hnuaiah (Financial power) thuneihna pek an ni a. Hei hian Administrative Approval leh Expenditure Sanction pek chhuah kawngah awlsamna min thlen dawn a ni.

Tin, kum hmasa lam atanga kan tawn hriat pawimawh tak chu Mother sanction kan hmuh tawh chuan a hun taka pawisa hman chhuah a, a hun taka kan SNA SPARSH Account kan khar (close) theih a ngai, tih hi a ni a. Administrative head ten a hun taka Utilization Certificates kan peih ngei ngei a ngai tihna a ni a. Lo inpeih thlap zel turin kan chah che u a ni.

SASCI Part 9 kalpui dan tharah Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) zela scheme tinte kan kalpui a ngai dawn a, State Welfare Scheme pawh a huam vek a; department zawng zawngin DBT mode kan hman vek a ngai tih hria ang u.

Tun SASCI kal mek (2026-27) a Part 4 leh Part 9 ah hian Mizoram tana incentive (thawh that vanga dawn belh theih) hmuh theih Rs. 650 crore a awm a. Kan state tana thatpui dawrh theih thil a nih avangin hmu thei ngei turin kan tang tlang dawn nia, a ti a. Workshop tangkai taka hmang turin a chah a ni.

He workshop hi Institute of Government Accounts & Finance leh Mizoram sorkar Finance Department te tangkawpin an buatsaih a ni a. Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Commissioner, Finance in a kaihruai a, a hawnna neih zawh hian mithiamten zirtirna an pe zui a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah World No Tobacco Day 2026 hman a ni
content:
779/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 1:Kum tin May ni 31-a hman ṭhin vaihlo leh a kaihhnawih ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna ni, 'World No Tobacco Day' (WNTD) chu National Tobacco Control Programme (NTCP), Lunglei District huaihawtin nimin, May ni 31, 2026 (Pathianni) khan BKHP Chhawmdawlna In, Melte, Serkawn, Lungleiah hman a ni a. Lunglei District Senior Chief Medical Officer (SCMO) Dr Lalrinthangi chu Khuallian a ni.

Khuallian SCMO Dr Lalrinthangi chuan vaihlo zuk leh hmuam chu ruihhlo ti tura kailawn hmasa ber a nih thu sawiin, miin vaihlo a tih tawh chuan thluakah ngawl veina siamin, sim a har thu a sawi a. Taksa leh rilru hrisel nan vaihlo leh a kaihhnawih laka inthiar fihlim turin mipuite a chah.

Lungleia WNTD 2026 puala hun hman hi Deputy CMO Dr Vanlalngheti'n a kaihruai a. Thupui atan "Unmasking the appeal – countering nicotine and tobacco addiction" (Tawktarh îtawm phèna túr – vaihlo ngawl veina do lêt) tih chu hman a ni.

NTCP Lunglei District Consultant Dr Lalnunsiama Renthlei chuan powerpoint presentation hmangin vaihlo zuk leh hmuamin mihring taksaa nghawng ṭha lo a neih theih dan hrang hrang zirtirin, vaihlo túr (nicotine) hna thawh te, e-cigarette (túrtuibúr) zûk ṭhat lohzia leh vaihlo sim dan kawng hrang hrang a sawi a. NTCP Lungleia Social Worker Pu Vanlalruata'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

NTCP Lunglei District hma laknain kum 2025–2026 chhung khan vantlang puipunna hmun leh pisaah mei zu an awm leh awm loh endikin Anti-Tobacco Squad Drive ṭum 75 kalpui a ni a. Zirna in hrang hrangah vaihlo ṭhat lohzia inzirtirna (awareness programme) ṭum 13 buatsaih niin, vaihlo khap leh khuahkhirh  chungchang training ṭum 7 buatsaih a ni bawk a. Zuk leh hmuam nghei duha Civil Hospital Lunglei OPD No. 11-a Tobacco Cessation Clinic pantu mi 523 an awm bawk.

Attachment

title: SERICULTURE MINISTER-IN BUL  TIAK 20000 MUGA PANGANG KHAWINA TUR CHU A VAI LIAM
content:
778/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl 1st June, 2026:Tukin dar 7:00 khan Sericulture Minister Pu Lalthansanga’n muga pangang khawina tur atana Central Silk Board, Boko, Guwahati nursery atanga lak chhuah Bul tiak 20000 (singhnih) chu Mualpheng leh Keifanga Progress Partners mi 41 te phun turin Directorate of Sericulture, Chaltlang atangin a vai liam.

Heng bul tiak te hi acre (tin) 61 hmun vel a zauva phun tur a ni a, Hand Holding scheme hnuaiah Sericulture Department leh Mizoram Khadi and Village Industries Board tang kawp (joint venture) project hi Saitual District khua Mualpheng leh Keifangah te kalpui mek a ni.

Minister chuan Mizoram chu Muga pangang khawi lamah hmun tha a ni tih a sawi a, Progress partner ten tha taka Bul kungte chu enkawl puitling turin duhsakna a hlan bawk. Bialtu MLA Prof Lalnilawma'n a enkawl puitlin kawnga an mamawh em em Community water tank a dah sak dawn avang pawhin lawmthu a sawi a. May ni 3, 2026 a Mizoram rawn tlawhtu, Pu Giriraj Singh, Union Textile Minister pawhin district 4 (Lunglei, Champhai, Saitual leh Siaha) ah te nasa leh zuala Muga silk pangang khawi nan fund Mizoram tan a pek a tiam tawh tih a sawi bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Sericulture Secretary Pi Florence Zotluangpuii pawhin thu sawiin, Ministry of Textiles, Government Of India pawhin Sericulture Deptartment a rawn ngaih pawimawhzia leh thawktute pawh ṭhahnemngai taka mahni hna ngai pawimawh lehzual turin a fuih a ni.

Attachment
